title: The tidb_redact_log cannot be applied to the explain.
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```
create table t(a int primary key);
set session tidb_redact_log=MARKER;
explain select * from t where a = 1;
```
<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

```
+---------------------+-----------+-----------+---------------+--------------------------------+
| id                  | estRows   | task      | access object | operator info                  |
+---------------------+-----------+-----------+---------------+--------------------------------+
| TableReader_7       | 174.87    | root      | partition:p1  | data:Selection_6               |
| └─Selection_6       | 174.87    | cop[tikv] |               | eq(test.t.a, <1>)                |
|   └─TableFullScan_5 | 174868.00 | cop[tikv] | table:t       | keep order:false, stats:pseudo |
+---------------------+-----------+-----------+---------------+--------------------------------+
```
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```
+---------------------+-----------+-----------+---------------+--------------------------------+
| id                  | estRows   | task      | access object | operator info                  |
+---------------------+-----------+-----------+---------------+--------------------------------+
| TableReader_7       | 174.87    | root      | partition:p1  | data:Selection_6               |
| └─Selection_6       | 174.87    | cop[tikv] |               | eq(test.t.a, 1)                |
|   └─TableFullScan_5 | 174868.00 | cop[tikv] | table:t       | keep order:false, stats:pseudo |
+---------------------+-----------+-----------+---------------+--------------------------------+
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
poc: create table t(a int primary key);
explain select * from t where a = 1;
key_bug_features: tidb_redact_log not applied to explain output
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), age INT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO users(id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM users WHERE age = 30;
CREATE TABLE orders(order_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
